sourceSummary.oneLine: Supplier approval package for SHEET-GF BACK DECO part MI63-03301A for model F4335-AW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as approval, inspection, quality control, reliability, hazardous substance, and packaging recycling evidence for the specified part.
keyPoints: Document code and SEC code are MI63-03301A for SHEET-GF BACK DECO.
Applicable model is F4335-AW and vendor/manufacturer is Hansung P&I.
Approval conclusion states approved and pass.
Key dimensions are width 89.7 ±0.3 mm and height 11.4 ±0.3 mm.
Material is identified as PC EMBO or 무광PC 0.125T in approval/inspection sections.
Part must not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
Outgoing inspection references DUQ1-0022K and Samsung hazardous substance management criteria.
Packaging recycling final grade is 우수.
